overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian temple interior with large decorated columns and hieroglyphic walls, then emerging onto a sunlit terrace overlooking water and mountains. The character continues walking along the terrace past large stone statues and other NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian hypostyle hall with painted columns and hieroglyphic walls

events.description: NPC in blue dress walks past on the left side
approaching the bright exit doorway, ambient light increases significantly

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the columned hall toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking past the character on the left side

entered.detail: massive cylindrical columns with red and blue painted lotus patterns near the base
stone walls covered in ancient Egyptian hieroglyphic carvings and paintings
metal stands with open flames providing warm light
white fabric banners hanging overhead between columns
large rectangular stone doorway with hieroglyphic carvings marking the exit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an ancient Egyptian temple interior featuring massive decorated stone columns with painted lotus patterns. Hieroglyphic carvings cover the walls, and burning braziers provide warm lighting. An NPC in a blue dress passes by on the left as the character approaches a bright exit doorway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit stone terrace with view of water and mountains

events.description: exits the interior temple through the stone doorway onto the exterior terrace
emerges into bright direct sunlight causing a dramatic lighting shift from dim interior

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the temple into bright sunlight and continuing across the terrace

entered.detail: wide stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
long red decorative carpets laid along the walking path
large palm trees in planters lining the terrace edges
distant mountain range visible across the water
large body of water visible beyond the terrace edge
stone seating along the left side of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character exits the temple through the large stone doorway, transitioning from the dim interior to a bright sunlit terrace. The scene opens to reveal a stunning view of a body of water and distant mountains. The character walks across stone tiles with red carpets toward the terrace edge, passing potted palm trees and stone benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace edge with large stone statues and mountain overlook

events.description: character turns right to walk along the terrace edge parallel to the water

agents.ego_description: turning right at the terrace edge to walk along the overlook with statues

notable_agents.action: several NPCs gathered near the large stone statues, some sitting on the steps

entered.detail: massive stone statues of seated figures with lion bodies and human heads
decorative stone walls and structures on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the terrace edge and walks along a path lined with massive stone sphinx statues on the right. The mountain range and body of water shift to the left side of the frame as the character moves parallel to the overlook. Other NPCs are visible gathered near the statues and sitting on the stone steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, ornate interior of an ancient Egyptian temple out onto a sprawling, sunlit terrace. It begins amidst massive stone columns painted with lotus patterns and walls covered in hieroglyphics, where burning braziers cast a warm glow as an NPC in a blue dress passes by. As the character approaches a bright exit, the scene transitions through a large stone doorway, shifting from the shadowed hall to a brilliant outdoor vista of distant mountains and water. The camera then moves across stone tiles and red carpets past potted palms and benches before turning right at the terrace edge. Finally, the view shifts to keep the mountains and water to the left as the character walks parallel to the overlook, passing a line of massive stone sphinx statues and gathered NPCs.
